logo_description: Coca-Cola logo: the iconic Spencerian script wordmark 'Coca-Cola' in white or red cursive lettering, often on a red background. The product appears as a red aluminum can or glass/plastic bottle with a white wave ribbon design and the Coca-Cola script. The classic contour glass bottle shape is also distinctive. Product packaging is predominantly red with white text. The word 'Coke' is also an accepted brand reference.
required_contexts: Social gatherings, meals, or celebratory moments
prohibited_contexts: competitor cola or soda brands (Pepsi, RC Cola, store brands)
health or diet claims not approved by Coca-Cola
